urdu transliteration text: MAASUM SAKINAA MUJHE ROTI HAI TO RO-E
english translation text: If Sakina is made to weep, let it be so

urdu transliteration text: WOH MERE BINAA SO NAHIn SAKTI HAI NA SO-E
english translation text: Should see be unable to sleep without me, let it be so

urdu transliteration text:
REH-JAAE MERI ZAINABE DILGIR KAA PARDAA
If only my broken hearted Zainab's veil is spared
HAMSHIR KAA PARDAA MERI DILGIR KA PARDAA
english translation text: The veil of my sister, the veil of the heartbroken
